summary: Iteration 15 - Full frontend testing of Hero Cursus Navigation + Audio Player Redesign. All 12 required features verified working via Playwright. Login, hero nav to /cursus/cursus-falsafa, cursus detail page, and full audio player redesign all pass.

issues: Author avatar (initials 'MS') has borderRadius: 11 — spec says 'aucun border-radius sauf bouton play'. This is a minor deviation: the circular avatar for scholar initials uses border-radius. Reported for E1 awareness.
The moreBtn (ellipsis '...') in top nav has no testID attribute — not accessible via data-testid for automated testing.

Course cards in /cursus/[id].tsx use data-testid directly on TouchableOpacity (not testID). React Native Web may not forward custom HTML attributes, so they may not be queryable via data-testid selector.

action_items: Minor: Add testID='audio-more-btn' to the ellipsis TouchableOpacity in audio/[id].tsx for testability.
Minor: Use testID prop (not data-testid) on TouchableOpacity for course cards in cursus/[id].tsx for React Native Web compatibility.

Minor: If spec strictly requires 'aucun border-radius sauf bouton play', consider removing borderRadius from authorAvatar in audio/[id].tsx (currently borderRadius: 11). The visual impact is minor (small initials circle).
critical_code_review_comments: cursus/[id].tsx L148: data-testid={`cursus-course-${course.id}`} on TouchableOpacity will NOT render as data-testid in DOM — use testID prop instead for React Native Web DOM accessibility.
audio/[id].tsx L269: moreBtn has no testID attribute — add testID='audio-more-btn' for testing.
audio/[id].tsx L537: authorAvatar has borderRadius:11 — per spec 'aucun border-radius sauf bouton play', this is a design inconsistency (minor).
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Used existing audio: aud_cours-traduction-mod-1, cursus: cursus-falsafa.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 12 features from iteration 15 pass. Key verified items: (1) Login testuser@hikma.com works; (2) COMMENCER hero button navigates to /cursus/cursus-falsafa (not /cursus tab); (3) Cursus detail page shows badge 'CURSUS A' rgb(4,209,130)=#04D182, cursus name, 7 courses, 37 episodes; (4) Audio page /audio/aud_cours-traduction-mod-1 loads without bottom tab bar; (5) Top nav: back btn 'ÉPISODES' + '...' ellipsis (no testID); (6) Badge 'CURSUS A · A. LA FALSAFA ET SON HÉRITAGE · ÉPISODE 1' green; (7) Artwork: #080D0B bg, 'A' ghost letter, concentric circles, ÉP. 01 bottom right, NO photo; (8) Waveform: 30 bars all #222222 (unplayed); (9) Play btn: #04D182 circle 60px, borderRadius 30px; Shuffle+skip15+play+skip15+playlist; (10) Speed '× 1' no border-radius, 1px solid #222; bookmark/share/download; (11) 'À PROPOS DE CET ÉPISODE' in #04D182, 'Lire plus →'; (12) No ACCUEIL/CURSUS/ÉPISODES/BIBLIO tab bar. Minor: author avatar also has borderRadius:11.
